title: SimpleHUD
body:
## Info
This Fabric mod displays FPS and ping on HUD.

This mod requires the '[Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)' mod to work.

## Config
To configure SimpleHUD to your liking, use [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu). In-game, click the Mods button in the main menu, search for “SimpleHUD” and click its icon to open the config.

## Contact

If you encounter any issues or bugs, or have a
request for a new feature, please contact me via Discord or join my Discord-Server.

> My discord-name is **Losterixx**.

> My Discord-Server: [Link](https://discord.gg/gnGsUAwp76)
